violations.text: The toilet was observed in poor repair, observed not properly flushing. Inspector observed new toilet on premises, PIC waiting for installation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (container of prepared ginger) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
TPHC logs for sushi rice were not available after 11/4/2025. Staff started new log for rice prepared today. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Seafood was observed thawing in container of still water. Another container of seafood was moved from under running water to the counter during inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. All seafood placed in refrigeration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Working containers of various ingredients (sauces, dry good, spices) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Cases of bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the storage room; containers of food items were stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths at the bar was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonium sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Bar utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Water spigot was turned on during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Prep station bench scraper was observed stored between prep station and counter. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Bar utensils in storage crocks are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The toilet was observed in poor repair, not properly flushing at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Broken glass and debris was observed around the dumpster area. Staff began sweeping area during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The bar and sushi bar shelves, footrests at the bar, and wall edging in the dining room are constructed of unsealed woo which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -low boy in kitchen -bar dish machine. Technicians were contacted during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The following was observed: -coving missing at floor/wall juncture at back door -ceiling tile missing in basement prep area. PIC stated tiles will be replaced in ceiling after technician completes running wires through area. Coving scheduled to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
The bar area is lacking a 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The dish machines in the kitchen and bar areas were not installed at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
3-bay sink in kitchen was not installed and functional at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The floors in the kitchen and bar areas were observed: -with incomplete tiles in kitchen area -non-sealed floors in dish wash area and bar -coving missing in areas of kitchen -walk-in was non-functional. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The ceiling in the basement prep area is covered with painted plaster that is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
